c.d: Availability of a shuffle play mode that allows users to play playlists in a random order.
Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface for creating and managing playlists.
Number of songs available in the app's catalog.
Ability to download songs for offline listening.
Maximum audio quality available for streaming and downloads.
Availability of the app across different platforms (iOS, Android, Windows, etc.).
c.s: Official app websites, app store listings

c.d: Monthly or annual cost of premium subscriptions.
Effectiveness of the app's algorithms in providing personalized song recommendations.
Ability to integrate with other devices and services (e.g., smart speakers, social media).
Availability of extra features such as lyrics display, music videos, podcasts, etc.
